专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the Physics Category enrollment majors include Software Engineering, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biological Sciences, etc. Among them, Software Engineering and Electronic Information are currently popular engineering directions in society. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025 (approximately 252,300). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 204,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 6.1% compared to 2025 (approximately 192,000). The expansion of the candidate pool slightly intensifies competition. Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, which is relatively far from Fujian Province, and the regional preference for cross-province study is weak, limiting its appeal to Fujian candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the decisive factor that the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan has expanded from 5 to 18 students (an increase of 260%), the ranking will significantly shift backward. At the same time, the increase of about 6.1% in Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province and the high popularity of engineering majors have a slight upward effect on the ranking. After weighing, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 64545, with a range of 64045 to 65045.
